name: Bug report

labels: bug

- For parse bugs: the `.flp` file (attach or describe).
- For diff bugs: BOTH `A.flp` and `B.flp`.
- For info bugs: the `.flp` file.

Minimal repros (blank project with one problematic channel/plugin,
saved from the same FL version) are welcome if you can't share the
original.
-->
